---
name: Demo Prototyping
about: Template for translating experimental results into a demonstration prototype.
title: "[DEMO] "
labels: demo, prototype
assignees: ''

---

## 🔗 Reference Experiment
<!-- Link to the GitHub Issue or results folder of the underlying experiment. -->

## 🎯 Demo Objective
<!-- Describe what specific capability or insight you want to demonstrate to stakeholders. -->

## 🛠️ Implementation Approach
<!-- How will this demo be built? (e.g., Gradio, notebook walkthrough, local script, web prototype). -->

## 🌟 Key Features to Showcase
<!-- List the primary features or interactions that need to be functional for the demonstration. -->

## 🖥️ User Experience / Flow
<!-- Briefly describe how a user will interact with the demo. -->

## 🚀 Deployment / Setup Plan
<!-- Where will this demo run? (e.g., local machine, Hugging Face Spaces, internal server). -->
